and 

• The services must be reasonable and necessary to the treatment of the patient's 
illness or injury. 

NOTE: A home health aide must be certified consistent the competency evaluation 
requirements. 

The reason for the visits by the home health aide must be to provide hands-on personal 
care of the patient or services needed to maintain the patient's health or to facilitate 
treatment of the patient's illness or injury.
